name: Asparagus Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Gradually add flour, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
3. Stir in cream and continue cooking until the mixture thickens.
4. Add salt, pepper, and paprika; stir until well combined.
5. Stir in shredded cheese until melted.
6. Arrange 1 can of drained asparagus at the bottom of a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
7. Pour the sauce over the asparagus.
8. Sprinkle mushrooms over the top.
9. Cover with remaining cans of asparagus and cracker crumbs.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
11. Yield: 6 servings.
